content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market rally with Nifty +0.43%, Bank Nifty +1.08%, Auto leading +1.81%, Pharma +1.26%. VIX cooling -3.46% to 17.29. Global cues supportive (US S&P +0.81%). Earnings season delivering — multiple Q4 beats driving stock-specific moves. Portfolio is 66% deployed with 12 holdings, mostly green. Focus this tick: trail SLs on winners, manage CHOLAHLDNG into May 8 binary, avoid new cluster-stacking.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.66,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +7.6%, near R1 1069. SL already at 1040.66 (+5.7% above entry, locks in ~+5.8% gain). CMP 1058.50 - SL gap 1.7% which is below 1% trail floor concern but already trailed; HOLD effectively. No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already trailed to lock in gains. SL 1040.66 vs CMP 1058.50 = 1.68% gap, healthy. Q4 +19% beat thesis intact, target 1110 within reach. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive anchor, -1.0% small loss. Gold supportive on geopolitics. SL 119 = -4.9% from CMP gives normal volatility room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "At 52w-high zone, +2% unrealized. Current SL 1715 already at breakeven+, gap to CMP 1734.50 is 1.13% — within 1% floor tolerance. No change needed. Switching to HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +68%, GNPA improvement materially priced. Near 52w high. SL 206 vs CMP 208.36 (1.1% gap) — adequate. Thesis intact, hold to target 222."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HAL at +1.8%, CMP 4660 vs SL at entry 4575 = 1.82% gap. SL already at breakeven. NOTE: Q4 board meeting May 14 — binary event ~6 sessions away, outside the 3-session rule but on the radar. No-op MODIFY; switch to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.8% with SL at breakeven 4575. Gap to CMP 4660 = 1.82%, healthy. Q4 board May 14 (~6 sessions) — will reassess closer to date. Defence momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.8% post Q4 +124% PAT print. Mid-day fade after intraday +9% spike. SL 1420 vs CMP 1440 = 1.4% gap, close but within tolerance. Thesis (104% FY26 PAT, net-debt negative, Rs 8,140 cr presales) intact. Hold to SL or target 1570."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2%, SL 6950 vs CMP 7050 = 1.4% gap. SL already at breakeven+0.7%. Q4 PAT +124% strong. Hold to target 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry. SL 820 vs CMP 837 = 2% gap. Faded from intraday high 862 — let it work. Q4 board mid-late May is binary event 1-3 weeks out. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, faded from intraday high 372. SL 358 vs CMP 366 = 2.3% gap. Q4 PAT +30% delivered, lending book Rs 2.07 lakh cr. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BINARY EVENT DISCIPLINE — Q4 audited annual results + earnings call scheduled May 8 (Friday) 3:30 PM IST = 2 trading sessions away. Per Rule 11, default disposition for binary catalyst within 3 sessions on positions >5% capital is EXIT or risk-trim. Position is ~4.3% of capital but holdco discount uncertainty + unannounced print = asymmetric tail. Mild loss -0.4% / -₹170 acceptable cost vs binary. Same playbook as TORNTPOWER/ADANIPOWER exits which were correct calls."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat. Q4 +18% PAT delivered. Defensive FMCG. SL 800 vs CMP 818.50 = 2.3% gap. Hold to target 855."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4%. Auto sector +1.81% leading. Q4 PAT +48%, FY26 record. SL 3210 vs CMP 3301 = 2.8% gap, within tolerance. Hold to target 3430."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",

    },
    {

    },
    {

      "reasoning": "Q4 beat strong; let SL absorb post-results chop."
    },
    {

      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+, Q4 PAT doubled."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defence shipbuilding catalyst; Q4 board ahead."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 +30% PAT; mild fade."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Binary May 8 results call within 3 sessions — exit ahead."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat, defensive FMCG."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",

      "reasoning": "Auto leadership; Q4 record results."
    }

  "watchlist_notes": "HFCL: Already have an OPEN MIS BUY 600 @ 133.50 placed 355 min ago. CMP now 135.18 — limit not filling and stock has run away. CANCEL the working order rather than stacking. Will not chase at +7% intraday; wait for VWAP pullback. Note: HFCL +84% in a month, extreme overbought. M&M, MARICO, NAVINFLUOR already held. CAMS, COFORGE, AUROPHARMA, BIOCON, VEDL, GABRIEL, NEULANDLAB, GRSE, LALPATHLAB, IRCON, SONACOMS — observed but no high-conviction setups today. LALPATHLAB 11x volume is interesting but already +18% on May 4 spike, chasing now is poor R:R. IRCON has Q4 May 19 binary + sector de-rating + Q3 revenue -19% YoY = research flagged BEARISH, skip. CAMS gapped 10.6% — chasing not allowed under same-session round-trip discipline.",
  "portfolio_notes": "12 positions, 66% deployed, well-diversified across Auto/Banking/HFC/Defence/Pharma/FMCG/Realty/Chemicals/Holdco. Today's tick is heavy on position management — the right call. CHOLAHLDNG exit is the only material action; aligns with Rule 11 binary-event discipline and prior successful TORNTPOWER/ADANIPOWER exits. NOT adding new positions today: (a) most watchlist names already had their gap-up move and chasing is poor R:R, (b) need to cancel stale HFCL working order rather than stacking duplicates, (c) sector caps tightening if I add more Financials/Capital Goods. Cash post-CHOLA exit ~Rs 388K = 38.5% — comfortable buffer, will deploy on cleaner setups. HFCL pending order: I am NOT cancelling it via this tick's schema (no CANCEL action defined), but flagging that it should be allowed to expire end-of-day; I will not stack a second."
}
